title: One-Hour Aerobic Family Window
objective: Use the available 1-hour family window for low-stress aerobic frequency after Friday's successful sweet spot ride.
why_now: Family constraints reduced Saturday availability, so the goal changes from endurance load to keeping rhythm without forcing volume.

targets.notes: Outdoor only. 1h cap at 50-68% FTP. This is aerobic frequency, not the long ride. Fuel is optional if well fed; use water unless starting hungry.

steps.notes: Easy aerobic. Keep climbs controlled and stay conversational.

cooldown.notes: Ease down by feel; no need to force ultra-low watts.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing is enough. If starting hungry, take 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst. Carbs are optional, not required, unless you start hungry.
nutrition.post: Normal meal with 25-35g protein and some carbs is enough.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: electrolytes/sodium only if hot or heavy sweating; otherwise none required. Daily baseline: keep creatine, B12, algae omega 3, vitamin D by season/sun/bloodwork, protein powder only for convenience, and glycine/magnesium only if useful for sleep; skip EAA, L-glutamine, taurine, and collagen unless a specific reason exists.

recovery.post_session: Normal meal, fluids to thirst, and easy walking if legs feel stiff.
recovery.evening: Keep the evening low stress; no extra hard training.
recovery.next_morning_check: Check legs, left calf, sleep, resting HR/HRV if available, and whether the ride felt genuinely easy.

pre_interval_cues: This is a 1-hour family-window ride, not the long ride.
Start only if Friday's sweet spot feels absorbed.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Stay aerobic. Do not add intensity.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Easy ride feels easy, no left-calf warning, and family timing stays protected.
